items.description: Array of menu items or groups to render.

defaultSelectedId.description: Default selected item ID for uncontrolled usage.

onSelect.description: Callback when a menu item is selected.

selectionStyle.description: Visual style for the selected item indicator.

iconPosition.description: Position of icons relative to label text.

collapsible.description: Whether the menu can be collapsed to icon-only mode.

mobileBreakpoint.description: Viewport width below which mobile mode activates.

mobileFullScreen.description: Whether mobile menu takes full screen.

showSearch.description: Show a search input to filter menu items.

searchPlaceholder.description: Placeholder text for the search input.

searchAriaLabel.description: Accessible label for the search input (used for screen readers).

headerSlot.description: Custom content rendered above the menu.

footerSlot.description: Custom content rendered below the menu.

toolbar.description: Enable toolbar mode (horizontal with border-bottom selection).

className.description: Additional CSS class for the nav element.

ariaLabel.description: ARIA label for the nav element.
